description: Style Noteflying machine puts a new spin on summer staples with their latest range of caps. The caps feature classic designs on innovative colour patterns and cuts. This piece is great to colour block your monochrome tee. Conservative at heart? Match this with your summer staple T-shirt. You can't ever go wrong in an off-duty ensemble with this cap.Product DetailsKhaki cap with embroidery and applique on the crown centre Has a curved visor with pipingEyelets all over the crown for breathabilityAdjustable Velcro back strap Material and Care100% cottonWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
